lesson.walletError: Wallet not connected or service not ready.
lesson.passChallenge: Please pass the challenge before completing the lesson.
Solana is a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain optimized for speed and low fees.

Core innovations:
- Proof of History (PoH)
- Tower BFT
- Parallel execution
- Runtime-level optimizations

Solana enables scalable decentralized applications.
lessons.solanaFundamentals.accounts.cont:
Everything in Solana is an account.

Accounts:
- Store state
- Have an owner (program)
- Require rent exemption
- Contain lamports and data

Programs modify account state via instructions.
Transactions contain one or more instructions.

Each transaction:
- Requires valid signers
- Executes atomically
- Pays network fees

Signers authorize state transitions.
lessons.solanaFundamentals.pda.title: Program Derived Addresses (PDAs)
lessons.solanaFundamentals.pda.content:
PDAs are deterministic addresses derived from seeds.

Characteristics:
- Off-curve
- Owned by programs
- Secure and predictable

Used for escrow, vaults, state accounts.
lessons.solanaFundamentals.helloChalleng: Create a function that returns the string "Hello Solana".
lessons.anchor.architecture.title: Anchor Project Architecture
lessons.anchor.architecture.content:
An Anchor project includes:

- programs/
- tests/
- migrations/
- Anchor.toml

Anchor abstracts boilerplate while preserving flexibility.
lessons.anchor.constraints.title: Account Constraints Deep Dive
lessons.anchor.constraints.content:
Anchor provides declarative constraints:

- seeds
- bump
- has_one
- payer
- mut

Constraints improve security and readability.
lessons.anchor.cpi.title: Cross Program Invocations (CPI)
lessons.anchor.cpi.content:
CPI allows programs to call other programs.

Important concepts:
- Program IDs
- Instruction contexts
- Signer seeds
lessons.anchor.token2022.title: Token-2022 Integration
lessons.anchor.cpiChallenge.title: Implement a CPI Call
lessons.anchor.testing.title: Testing Anchor Programs
lessons.anchor.testing.content: Return true to simulate successful test execution.
lessons.protocol.compression.title: State Compression
lessons.protocol.compression.content:
State compression reduces on-chain storage costs using Merkle trees.

Applications:
- NFTs
- Large datasets
- Scalable protocol design
lessons.protocol.compute.title: Optimizing Compute Units
lessons.protocol.compute.content:
Efficient programs reduce compute usage.

Strategies:
- Avoid unnecessary deserialization
- Minimize account reads
- Optimize CPI calls
lessons.protocol.security.title: Security Patterns in Solana
lessons.protocol.security.content:
Common vulnerabilities:
- Reinitialization attacks
- PDA misconfiguration
- Incorrect signer validation

Secure design prevents protocol exploits.
